message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Skava Integration - Order Replaced Completed

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam ParticipantPadding 40
skinparam BoxPadding 20
skinparam SequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam NoteBorderColor black
skinparam NoteBackgroundColor white

box "Skava AWS" #FFFFFF
  participant "Skava Event\nOrchestration" as SEO1
end box

box "Kafka" #DFF3F6
  participant "Topics" as KTopics
end box

box "YL Services" #E9E9FF
  participant "Order Sync Service" as OSS1
end box

database "Legacy DB" as LDB1

SEO1 -> KTopics : 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message

== Async ==

KTopics -> OSS1 : 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate OSS1
OSS1 -> LDB1 : 3 Update order status in legacy db
LDB1 --> OSS1 : 4 Response/Order ID
OSS1 -> KTopics : 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
deactivate OSS1

== Async ==

KTopics -> SEO1 : 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message

@enduml
```
